category_sources: source_facts.description describes Solana as a web-scale blockchain for decentralized apps; official Agave docs at https://docs.anza.xyz/ describe the Solana CLI tool suite and validator client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is solana; source_facts.description and official docs use Solana naming for the CLI/network tooling.
docs_sources: Anza's official Agave docs cover the Solana CLI tool suite for this package; Solana's official docs provide broader Solana development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/anza-xyz/agave, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions blockchain and decentralized apps; source_facts.executables include solana CLI, keygen, test validator, and Agave validator tools.
